ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shareholders" (
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholder */,
  "shareholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the shareholder or investment firm */,
  "stake_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total shares owned by the shareholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the shareholder */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Brief description of the investment strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shareholder record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shareholder record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share record */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder who owns the shares */,
  "shares_owned" INTEGER /* Total number of shares owned */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total monetary value of the shares owned */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company whose shares are owned */,
  "share_class" TEXT /* Class of shares (e.g., A, B, common, preferred) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current market price of the shares */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the share record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the share record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction record */,
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the share record that the transaction pertains to */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "shares_bought_sold" INTEGER /* Number of shares bought or sold */,
  "total_change" REAL /* Percentage change in shares owned after the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction occurred */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid for the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_share_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_id") REFERENCES shares ("share_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder whose performance is being measured */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "performance_metric" REAL /* Value of the performance metric (e.g., ROI, total gain) */,
  "performance_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., ROI, total gain, CAGR) */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial investment amount */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the investment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_performance_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permission is assigned to */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature or module in the system (e.g., transaction management) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder for which market data is relevant */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the shares on the given date */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "share_class" TEXT /* Class of shares */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price since the last record */,
  "volume_traded" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, transaction, market analysis) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, CSV) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
